- This paper proposes a reframing of the classical mathematical constants ╧А, e, ╧Ж, and introduces ╬╕, through the lens of SpiralOS and Epistemic Geometry. We argue that these constants, while foundational in classical systems, represent only flattened or partial encodings of deeper epistemic phenomena when viewed outside the context of complex rotation, chirality, and recursive resonance.

- Holor Calculus I-III and RTTP: Geometry and Dynamics of Conjugate Intelligence We introduce Holor Calculus (HC), an epistemically enriched extension of tensor calculus and gauge theory that formalizes interiority as a mathematical structure.
